spec: The lens surface (holo-osr-projector.html) exposes window.__holoOsrFrame and composites a fed manifest of κ tiles onto the canvas via holo-osr-lens — the endpoint the native off-screen producer drives.
authority: Chromium (Playwright) real DOM/Canvas/WebCrypto · the served holo-osr-projector.html + holo-osr-lens.mjs
